rationale: Exp 350 showed max_depth=8 achieved best Brier score (0.185830), outperforming current max_depth=6 by -0.000182. Recent experiments confirm max_depth=7 is stable at -0.000251 improvement, but max_depth=8 showed slightly better performance. Increasing depth marginally should capture more complex match patterns in 2023+ data while avoiding overfitting given strong regularization (reg_lambda=1).
